MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SILVIA VERONESE's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Off calendar. Entire action dismissed on April 21, 2026. Defendant's request for fees to be made by separate motion.
